<Auto Player>My colleague, Aster, is an archer like you.

an attack from terrible foes. Would you
be willing to spare some of yours?

practice while foraging. Beautiful form!\. You

<Auto Player>Uh, what do you want in trade?

Sparkly jewelry and romance novels of course!
<Auto Player>Well, um, I don't seem to have anything
like that on me at present...
<Auto Event: 3>Better luck next time.\. Until you bring
me something I want, I'll keep my arrows
to myself thank you very much.

parameters.name: THE DOORS TO NETHERWHERE - PARTY JOIN FANFARE OGG

parameters: <Auto Player>Our temple village will soon be beset by a
horde most foul. They seek our secret\..\..\.. I
mean our lives. Might I compel you to join in
<Auto Event: 3>I know all about your Doors to Netherwhere
you goof. Dryads live for hundreds of years.
The monastery is soooo boring. Just a bunch
of stodgy dudes and not enough music.
If even one of you doorknobs had the
musical talent to play along with my flute,
I might be compelled to keep you alive.
But I'm not holding my breath. Sorry, pal.
<Auto Event: 3>What do you have to trade?
<Auto Event: 3>Oh!\. It's beautiful. I'll trade you
A new J&S Riczu novel?!\. I loved "Diary
of an Ignoble Princess" and don't already
own this! Please take 5 arrows and then
bugger off so I can read.
